heroSubtitle: Real solutions for real industries — see the platforms we've built
intro: We don't just talk about what we can do — we build it. These projects demonstrate how OBH Software has developed innovative platforms that solve industry-specific challenges across construction, transport and sustainability.

caseStudies.title: AscertPro — Construction Inspection & Compliance App
caseStudies.summary: A field-ready iOS/iPadOS inspection app for assigned certifiers and inspectors, purpose-built around Irish building regulations. Digitises the inspection process with 120+ compliance questions across 12 work stages, automated PDF reports and offline functionality.
caseStudies.challenge: Inspectors on-site were relying on paper drawings and handwritten notes, spending hours writing detailed reports afterwards. Photos were taken on phones and uploaded later — disconnected from the inspection record. Each inspector recorded things differently with no standardised approach. Ireland's target of 300,000 new houses by 2030 means inspections are a known bottleneck, with inefficiencies increasing project timelines by 10–20%.
approach: Built structured digital inspection workflows across 12 BCAR work stages with 120+ compliance questions
Developed automated PDF report generation directly from inspection data — eliminating manual write-up
Implemented batch inspections to apply the same data across multiple units simultaneously
Photos captured in context — attached directly to specific compliance questions, not floating on a camera roll
Auto-save drafts via local storage to prevent inspection data loss
Designed for iPhone (in-hand on site) and iPad (desk review) with adaptive layouts
Full offline functionality — no internet dependency on site

testimonial.quote: AscertPro is launching on building sites in 2026 — bringing structured digital inspections, automated reporting and offline compliance tools to assigned certifiers across Ireland.

caseStudies.title: Quantum Mechanics — Digital Fleet Management & Job Cards
caseStudies.summary: A comprehensive digital platform that eliminates paperwork and automates compliance for haulage companies, featuring digital job cards, HGV inspections, real-time tracking and predictive maintenance.
caseStudies.challenge: Transport firms struggle with paper-based job cards, compliance risks, fleet downtime and inaccessible data. These inefficiencies slow operations, increase costs and create regulatory exposure. Haulage companies needed a modern digital solution to manage their entire fleet lifecycle.
approach: Built digital job cards with secure cloud storage and digital signatures
Developed automated HGV inspections using standardised checklists
Implemented real-time vehicle tracking and fleet dashboards
Designed seamless compliance reporting and audit trails
Added offline functionality for drivers on the road

testimonial.quote: Quantum Mechanics has digitised our entire fleet management workflow. The digital job cards and automated inspections save us hours every week, and we're always audit-ready.
testimonial.author: Fleet Manager, Transport & Logistics

caseStudies.title: ECOnstruction — Sustainable Construction Platform
caseStudies.summary: A sustainability-focused platform that helps construction firms adopt eco-friendly practices by quantifying value, highlighting cost-efficient materials and guiding firms through government incentives.
caseStudies.challenge: The construction industry is responsible for 38% of global carbon emissions, yet sustainable practices are viewed as costly and complex. Builders hesitate due to lack of immediate results, perceived high costs, complexity and slow adoption of new technologies. The industry needed data-driven proof that sustainability can be both profitable and practical.
approach: Built tools to quantify added value of sustainable features (e.g., solar panels increasing property value)
Developed cost-efficient materials database and comparison engine
Created calculators showing cost offsets through local sourcing strategies
Integrated government incentive guides including grants and tax credits
Designed real-time dashboards for carbon impact and cost savings
Applied human-centred design thinking throughout the platform

testimonial.quote: ECOnstruction showed us that sustainable building practices aren't just good for the environment — they're good for business. The data on cost savings and property value increases was eye-opening.
testimonial.author: Director, Construction Firm

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Great Together?
cta.description: Let's discuss how OBH can develop custom platforms, automate workflows or build sustainable solutions for your business.
